name: Podium Minerals Limited
description: Podium Minerals Limited (ASX: POD) is an Australian exploration and resource development company focused on becoming a leading producer of Platinum Group Metals (PGM). The company’s primary asset is the 100%-owned Parks Reef Project, located in Western Australia, which contains a significant deposit of platinum, palladium, rhodium, iridium, and gold, alongside base metals such as copper, nickel, and cobalt. Podium is dedicated to developing a reliable, sustainable supply of these critical minerals to support global decarbonization efforts and the transition to a clean energy future.
